novelty: Comprehensive validation evidence compilation from 99 waves

Internal Consistency.Direction stability: 100% — zero signals flip at higher thresholds

Biological Plausibility.CPI immune AEs: All immune-mediated AEs 100%F, consistent with autoimmune F-bias
Biological Plausibility.Opioid respiratory: 91.1%F respiratory AEs, consistent with known sex difference

Reproducibility.Drug fingerprint clusters: 12 clusters map to known pharmacological classes
Reproducibility.Within-class consistency: Same targets yield same direction (different magnitude)

External Validation.Known sex differences confirmed: Osteoporosis F>M, gout M>F, lupus F>M
External Validation.Clinical trial gap: 452/466 biased drugs with zero sex-stratified trials

Robustness Checks.Confidence tier stratification: Pattern persists across all confidence levels
Robustness Checks.Multi-reporter agreement: Consumer, MD, pharmacist all show female excess (56-67%F)
Robustness Checks.Temporal persistence: Core patterns stable 2013-2025 despite declining trend
Robustness Checks.Effect size distribution: 66.5% medium, 27.8% large effects (not driven by outliers)
